Day advanced to 2026-03-24.
9,044 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-23 -> 2026-03-24)

- "Which country's citizens will Australia say are covered by its temporary six-month visitor ban, in a Home Affairs announcement by March 31, 2026?" → Iran
- "What country will Latvian officials say a drone that crashes after entering from Russian airspace may be linked to by March 31, 2026?" → Ukraine

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (316 resolved, 14 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
